extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series has a clear U‑shape where it reaches its lowest value roughly around the middle of the time axis and then rises to end clearly higher than that minimum.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series decreases but then forms only a shallow dip (not a pronounced U‑shape) and stays roughly flat in the middle and final parts, without a strong rise from its minimum.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial drop, the series rises and its highest peak occurs in the second half of the time axis (after roughly the midpoint).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial drop, the series rises and its highest peak occurs in the first half of the time axis (before roughly the midpoint).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the early peak and drop, the series’ second main rising segment (roughly the middle of the time axis) climbs to a *moderate* level (around 0.45–0.55) and then stays oscillating in that moderate band, without any clear tendency to drift lower toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the early peak and drop, the series’ second main rising segment (roughly the middle of the time axis) climbs to a *moderate* level (around 0.45–0.55) but then shows a gradual downward drift so that the final values lie noticeably below that middle-plateau level.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial drop, the series shows a long, steady rise starting roughly from its minimum around the middle of the time span and ends clearly higher than that minimum.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial drop, the series rises from its minimum around the middle of the time span but then flattens or slightly declines, ending at a level similar to or only slightly above that minimum.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series shows a long U‑shaped segment whose minimum stays relatively high (does not drop much below 0.1–0.12) before rising again.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series shows a long U‑shaped segment whose minimum drops clearly lower (well below 0.1, closer to 0.05) before rising again.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series starts around a mid–high value, drops to a clear minimum roughly one‑third into the time axis, then rises and stays in a generally higher plateau over the last third, with the final value noticeably higher than the minimum and similar to or higher than the starting level.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series starts around a mid–high value, rises quickly to form a single pronounced early peak within the first 10%–15% of the time axis, then declines to a minimum around one‑third into the time axis and afterward increases to a moderate level, but finishes clearly below both the starting value and that early peak.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series starts moderately high, drops to a low point around the first third of the timeline, then rises steadily and ends higher than its lowest point but not higher than its initial level.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series starts moderately high, rises to a pronounced early peak that is clearly higher than both its start and end values, then declines and later partially recovers but never reaches that initial peak again.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series rises to a second hump whose maximum value stays below 0.55.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series rises to a second hump whose maximum value reaches at least 0.55.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial peak and decline, the series shows a clear sustained upward trend in the second half, ending higher than the mid-series trough and roughly at or above its mid-series level.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial peak and decline, the series shows a mid-series upward bump but then resumes a mild downward or flat trend, ending at or below its mid-series level and not clearly recovering upward.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial drop, the series shows a clear U‑shape: it reaches its global minimum roughly in the middle of the time axis and then rises to a sustained higher level toward the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial drop, the series mainly follows a declining or flat trend: it reaches its minimum roughly in the middle but then fails to recover, ending at a level similar to or lower than the mid‑series values.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the mid-point of the series, the values rise and remain mostly above 0.4 for an extended segment.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the mid-point of the series, the values rise but stay mostly between 0.3 and 0.5, without a long segment clearly above 0.5.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The time series reaches its global maximum very early (near the beginning), then shows a long, mostly monotonic decline until roughly the middle of the series, followed by a later, moderate rebound that never surpasses the early peak.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an early peak and decline, the time series exhibits a more symmetric “valley–hill” pattern: it bottoms out near the first third of the series and then rises to a second, broad plateau whose height is comparable to or slightly below the earliest peak.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial drop and recovery, the series’ late segment (roughly last third) shows a clearly rising trend, ending above 0.45.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial drop and recovery, the series’ late segment (roughly last third) is flat or gently falling, ending at or below about 0.45.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series has a clear U‑shaped pattern, reaching its minimum around the middle, and then rises to end noticeably higher than this minimum (strong recovery in the second half).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial peak and decline, the series forms a U‑shape but then rises and levels off so that the final values stay roughly flat and close to the mid‑series plateau, instead of continuing a strong upward recovery.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial peak and decline, the series forms a clear “U” shape: it decreases to a pronounced minimum in the middle portion, then rises back up and ends at a level similar to or higher than the initial level.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial peak and decline, the series decreases to a pronounced minimum in the middle portion, then rises but ends clearly below the initial level (i.e., it does not recover to its starting height).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial drop and recovery, the late segment (roughly the last third of the series) shows a clearly rising trend, ending at a higher value than the middle “valley-to-plateau” region.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial drop and recovery, the late segment (roughly the last third of the series) is flat or slightly declining, ending at a similar or lower value than the middle “valley-to-plateau” region.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial drop, the series reaches a clear lowest point roughly in the middle of the time axis, then shows a sustained upward trend toward the end (ending clearly higher than that middle minimum).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial drop, the series reaches a clear lowest point roughly in the middle of the time axis, then rises but either flattens or slightly declines so that the end level is similar to or lower than the middle-high region (no strong final upward trend).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After an initial drop, the series rises and stays mostly ABOVE its own mid-range level in the second half of the time window.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After an initial drop, the series rises and stays mostly AROUND or BELOW its own mid-range level in the second half of the time window.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: After the initial drop, the series’ second rise peaks clearly above 0.5.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: After the initial drop, the series’ second rise stays at or below about 0.5.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series ends higher than it begins (final value > initial value).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series ends lower than it begins (final value < initial value).
